id: install-datacake-plugin-for-1-nce-os
title: "Install Datacake plugin for 1NCE OS"
description: "Allows setting up an integration with Datacake workspace to allow data transfer from 1NCE OS."

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/v1/partners/DATACAKE/plugins"}
